name: One Pan Chicken & Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté the onion and celery in butter until tender.
2. Add the cooked chicken and top with the uncooked noodles.
3. In a bowl, combine the soup, broth, lemon juice, and pepper.
4. Pour the mixture over the noodles, moistening all the ingredients.
5. Scatter the mushrooms on top.
6. Cover and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat to simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
